# BRIEF

## Goal

Make the advertised Standard and Plus project/language limits real in the backend.

## Success Criteria

- Standard users cannot create more than 1 project.
- Standard users cannot exceed 3 languages per project.
- Plus users cannot create more than 5 projects.
- Plus users cannot exceed 7 languages per project.
- Admin users are unrestricted.
- Tests cover the enforcement behavior.

## Non-Goals

- File count/storage/traffic limits.
- Frontend limit UI polish.
- Upgrade flow.
